channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: This is the top-rated seafood restaurant in California, according to Yelp
item.description: There are plenty of fish in the sea, as the old saying goes. Unfortunately, there are far fewer exceptional chefs who can cook one for dinner. Knowing this, the analysts at Yelp have sought to identify the top-rated seafood restaurants in each state.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump administration investigates Maine for claims of withholding gender transitions from parents
item.description: PORTLAND, Maine (AP) — The administration of President Donald Trump is investigating Maine with a claim that dozens of school districts in the state violate federal law by withholding information about students' gender transitioning from parents. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Musk deletes post promising he'd go to Wisconsin to deliver $2 million to Supreme Court race voters
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Billionaire Elon Musk on Friday deleted a social media post in which he had announced plans to hold a rally in Wisconsin to “personally hand over” $2 million to a pair of voters who have already cast their ballots in the state’s hotly contested Supreme Court race.
item.dc:creator: SCOTT BAUER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: A mayor's lawsuit shut down a newspaper over fake stories. Now he faces corruption allegations
item.description: EVERETT, Mass. (AP) — For years, the mayor of a Boston suburb dreaded Wednesdays. That was the day when a local weekly would publish shocking allegations that he was on the take, sexually harassing women or under investigation by the FBI.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Myanmar at a glance: Embroiled in civil war, now facing more devastation after powerful earthquake
item.description: Even before a powerful 7.7-magnitude quake hit Myanmar on Friday, more than 3 million people in the country had been displaced, and hundreds of thousands were cut off from vital food and health programs as a result of a destructive four-year civil war that international groups claim has indiscrimina
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Betty White, TV's Golden Girl, celebrated at stamp ceremony in Los Angeles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Betty White is making her mark on the nation's snail mail. The beloved actor of “The Golden Girls” fame was celebrated with a new U.S. Postal Service stamp at a first-day-of-issue ceremony at the Los Angeles Zoo on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear displays his colors in veto fights with Republican lawmakers
item.description: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — Knowing the odds of winning were stacked against him, Democratic Gov. Andy Beshear nevertheless vetoed bills sent his way by the Republican-dominated Kentucky legislature with by-now familiar themes: abortion, Medicaid and diversity initiatives.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A look at who has been detained or deported in a US crackdown on pro-Palestinian protesters
item.description: Supporters of Palestinian causes with ties to American universities have been detained in the Trump administration’s crackdown on immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Noted economist honored by Trump warns his 25% tariffs could add $4,711 to the cost of a vehicle
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Noted economist Arthur Laffer warns in a new analysis that President Donald Trump's 25% tariffs on auto imports could add $4,711 to the cost of a vehicle and says the proposed taxes could weaken the ability of U.S. automakers to compete with their foreign counterparts.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump: House should take up Senate-passed DC funding fix immediately
item.description: President Trump is urging swift passage of legislation to fix what members have called a “mistake” by Congress that forced significant cuts to Washington, D.C.’s local budget. Trump on Friday wrote on Truth Social that the House should “immediately” take up the “D.C.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, NewsNation

item.title: Migrant border encounters under Trump continue to dwarf Biden's record highs
item.description: President Donald Trump continues to see record low migrant encounters at the southern border compared to this time last year under former President Joe Biden.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel strikes Beirut for the first time since a ceasefire ended the latest Israel-Hezbollah war
item.description: BEIRUT, Lebanon (AP) — Israel on Friday launched an attack on Lebanon's capital for the first time since a ceasefire ended the latest Israel-Hezbollah war in November.
item.dc:creator: BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: DOJ asks Supreme Court to intervene in deportation flights case
item.description: The Trump administration asked the Supreme Court on Friday to allow it to invoke the Alien Enemies Act to carry out swift deportations.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Trump holds 'productive call' with new Canadian prime minister
item.description: President Trump spoke with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney on Friday for the first time since Carney was elected earlier in the month amid tensions between the two nations.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: A second South Carolina death row inmate chooses execution by firing squad
item.description: A second South Carolina death row inmate has asked to die by firing squad just five weeks after the state carried out its first execution by bullets.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey Collins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Archeologists unearth signs from 1700s of British control in Florida after centuries of Spanish rule
item.description: The centuries-old city of St. Augustine is an enduring reminder of Spain’s long history in Florida, going back generations before the United States even existed.
item.dc:creator: David Fischer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: American couple still imprisoned in Mexico over timeshare dispute
item.description: A Michigan couple remains behind bars in a Mexican prison, accused of breaching a timeshare contract — but their lawyer said the resort that filed the criminal complaint against them breached the contract first.
item.dc:creator: Shajaka Shelton, KTLA 5

item.title: Snake covered by Endangered Species Act killed at Michigan park
item.description: Officials are urging “understanding” over “fear” after a federally protected snake was recently found killed at the Matthaei Botanical Gardens and Nichols Arboretum in Ann Arbor.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, KREX 5

item.title: Karen Read trial: Juror in 1st mistrial joins defense as suspected cop killer returns to court
item.description: A Massachusetts attorney who served as an alternate juror in the mistrial of Karen Read last year has joined her defense in her second murder trial.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk to travel to Wisconsin ahead of judicial race, hand out $1M checks
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk announced late Thursday he would be traveling to Wisconsin ahead of a high-stakes state Supreme Court race to talk with voters and hand out $1 million checks to several people who have already cast ballots.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KRON4

item.title: Lawyer for Michigan couple held in Mexican prison says resort company is at fault
item.description: A Michigan couple remains behind bars in a Mexican prison, accused of breaching a timeshare contract — but their lawyer said the resort that filed the criminal complaint against them breached the contract first.
item.dc:creator: Shajaka Shelton, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Americans’ outlook on economy becomes a bit more pessimistic: Poll
item.description: Around 57 percent of those earning under $50,000 said their financial situation is “bad,” while 39 percent argued it is “good,” the poll found.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Trump order targets 'divisive narratives' in Smithsonian museums
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday signed an executive order seeking to exert more control over what is displayed at Smithsonian museums and federal sites, citing what the White House called “divisive narratives” promoted by certain museums.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, ABC 4

item.title: Vandal strikes Cybertruck, Tesla owner hits back
item.description: An accused vandal is "under investigation" after appearing to drag a key across a Tesla Cybertruck outside of the Omni Mountain Resort & Spa in Brenton Woods, New Hampshire.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration moves to end union rights for many federal workers
item.description: The order targets agencies it says have a national security mission but many of the departments don’t have a strict national security connection.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, KRON4

item.title: Judge says heat in Texas prisons unconstitutional as states face mounting lawsuits
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — A federal judge's rebuke of Texas housing prisoners in lockups without air conditioning stopped short of ordering a fix before summer in what has become of the country's biggest lawsuits over keeping prisoners safe during dangerous extreme heat. But U.S.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Eleven 'cranker colony' suspects charged after allegedly pilfering Florida home of deployed Air Force member
item.description: Florida authorities have arrested 11 people with drug and theft crimes after they allegedly broke into the Florida home of a deployed airman.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: As many as 6 hurricanes forecast to strike US this season
item.description: “It only takes one landfall to create a devastating season,” AccuWeather chief meteorologist Jonathan Porter said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, ABC 4

item.title: How this auto union leader's support for Trump's tariffs scrambled labor politics again
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump has once again scrambled the politics of organized labor and the working class with his planned tariffs on auto imports.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW and STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: FAA acknowledges it must do better after deadly DC air collision
item.description: The head of the Federal Aviation Administration told Congress during a hearing Thursday about a midair collision over Washington, D.C., that killed 67 people that the agency must do more to ensure flying remains safe.
item.dc:creator: JOSH FUNK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Luigi Mangione may get a laptop in jail to work on his defense in CEO murder case
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A judge cleared the way Thursday for Luigi Mangione to get a laptop behind bars — if his jailers agree — so he can examine documents and other material in the UnitedHealthcare CEO murder case.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Civil rights groups say push to dismantle Education Department will undo hard-won gains
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The rights of Americans to self-determine how to educate their children — a hotly contested matter that stretches back to at least the Civil War — have long been intertwined with the principle of equally and equitably educating children across racial lines.
item.dc:creator: MATT BROWN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Violin thief-turned-bank robber sentenced to 4 years in prison
item.description: A California man convicted of orchestrating a scheme to steal valuable violins, and then robbing a bank when he realized federal investigators were closing in on him, has been sentenced.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Meghan Markle wants royals to ‘cave,' using royal title to make money: Insider
item.description: Meghan Markle's rep didn't return an email asking if the As Ever or ShopMy proceeds were going to charity or her account.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Sundance Film Festival is leaving Utah for Colorado, starting in 2027
item.description: Boulder has officially been unveiled as the city to host the Sundance Film Festival starting in 2027, according to a press release from the Sundance Institute.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tourist submarine sinks near Egypt, leaving 6 dead
item.description: A recreational submarine taking tourists on an underwater cruise of coral reefs in the Red Sea sank off the Egyptian coast.
item.dc:creator: Samy Magdy, Fox 5

item.title: A new Trump portrait for Colorado's Capitol could take time after one he disliked was removed
item.description: Filling an empty space on the wall of presidential portraits in the Colorado Capitol with a new painting of Donald Trump could take time after one he disliked was removed and put into storage.
item.dc:creator: MEAD GRUVER, Associated Press, ABC 4
